skills.name: Node.js / Bunjs
skills.description: Event-driven, non-blocking I/O runtime. Experienced in building high-throughput services, handling streams, cluster setups, and custom server architectures.

skills.name: Redis
skills.description: In-memory data structure store used as a database, cache, and message broker. Advanced usage in pub/sub patterns and caching strategies.

skills.name: Microservices
skills.description: Designing distributed systems, service boundaries, inter-service communication (REST, gRPC, event-driven), and service registries.

skills.name: Event Loop
skills.description: Deep understanding of Node.js event loop phases, microtasks/macrotasks scheduling, call stack execution, and performance tuning.

skills.name: JavaScript
skills.description: Advanced ES6+ JavaScript, asynchronous programming (Promises/async-await), closures, scoping, prototypes, and memory management.

skills.name: TypeScript
skills.description: Strictly typed superset of JS. Strong knowledge of custom types, generics, interfaces, and decorators for scalable codebases.

skills.name: System Design
skills.description: Designing highly scalable, available, and fault-tolerant architectures. Load balancing, horizontal scaling, database sharding, and caching.

skills.name: Data Structures
skills.description: Deep understanding of linear and non-linear structures, binary trees, heaps, graphs, hashing, and complexity analysis.

skills.name: Algorithms
skills.description: Asymptotic analysis, divide & conquer, greedy methods, dynamic programming, graph traversal, and complexity classes (P vs NP).

skills.name: Operating Systems
skills.description: CPU scheduling, process synchronization, memory management (paging/virtual memory), file systems, and deadlocks.

skills.name: Databases (Theory)
skills.description: Relational model algebra, normalization theory (up to BCNF), transaction concurrency control, and crash recovery.

skills.name: QuestDB
skills.description: Fast time-series database designed for high-throughput ingestion and real-time SQL analytics on vehicle telemetry.

skills.name: ClickHouse
skills.description: Fast, column-oriented database management system for online analytical processing (OLAP) on telemetry data.

skills.name: Kafka
skills.description: Distributed event streaming platform. Architected event-driven pipelines for telemetry ingestion and pub/sub communication.

skills.name: MQTT
skills.description: Lightweight publish/subscribe messaging protocol optimized for resource-constrained telemetry devices in EV systems.

skills.name: Uber H3
skills.description: Hexagonal hierarchical spatial index. Used for geographic visualization, vehicle location mapping, and telemetry queries.

skills.name: BullMQ
skills.description: Redis-backed message queue for handling asynchronous jobs, rate-limiting, and background task processing in Node.js.

skills.name: Financial Modeling
skills.description: Creating complex financial projections, cash flow analysis, discounted cash flow (DCF) models, and business valuations.

skills.name: Docker / Podman
skills.description: Containerizing applications, writing optimized multi-stage Dockerfiles, managing container orchestration, and volume mounting.

skills.name: PostgreSQL
skills.description: Relational database design, writing complex SQL queries, index optimization, execution plan analysis, and connection pooling.

skills.name: MongoDB
skills.description: NoSQL document storage, schema design for high growth, aggregation pipelines, replica sets, and indexing strategies.

skills.name: AWS Core Services
skills.description: Deploying apps using EC2, RDS, S3, IAM, CloudWatch, and Lambda. Infrastructure as Code (Terraform) integration.

skills.name: Computer Networks
skills.description: OSI stack layers, TCP/IP protocols, routing algorithms (OSPF, BGP), congestion control, and network security.

skills.name: Computer Architecture
skills.description: Instruction pipelining, addressing modes, memory hierarchy, cache optimization, and I/O interface design.

skills.name: DuckDB
skills.description: Embedded analytical database engine designed for fast local analytical queries and serverless data processing.

skills.name: Go
skills.description: Statically typed compiled language used for writing lightweight microservices and low-overhead CLI tools.

skills.name: Ollama & vLLM
skills.description: Running, scaling, and optimizing large language models (LLMs) locally, generating text and managing vector embeddings.

skills.name: Liftbridge
skills.description: Lightweight distributed message log providing queueing and streaming. Contributed porting patches for Termux/Android.

skills.name: Python
skills.description: Writing automation scripts, basic data visualization, and data analysis using Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib.

skills.name: Kubernetes

skills.name: GraphQL

skills.name: CI/CD Pipelines

skills.name: WebSockets

skills.name: Compiler Design

skills.name: Microprocessors

skills.name: Vector DB
